requirement_topic.en: Georgia GEOSTM Conformity Assessment Scope for EV Chargers
requirement_topic.zh: 格鲁吉亚GEOSTM电动汽车充电桩合格评定适用范围
requirement_topic.zht: 喬治亞GEOSTM電動汽車充電樁合格評定適用範圍

summary.en: GEOSTM (Georgian National Agency for Standards and Metrology) is Georgia's national standardization body. Georgia's EU DCFTA (Deep and Comprehensive Free Trade Area) obligations commit Georgia to approximate its technical regulations and conformity assessment procedures to EU norms, directing Georgian standards toward IEC/EN frameworks. GEOSTM adopts IEC and EN standards as Georgian standards (GOST-compatible adoption nomenclature is used for legacy reasons, but the direction is EU-aligned, not EAEU). Electrical products imported into Georgia, including EV chargers, may be subject to GEOSTM conformity assessment where technical regulations are in force. As of 2026-06-14, a single published mandatory whole-unit EVSE product certification regulation from GEOSTM could not be confirmed from official sources; exporters should verify the current GEOSTM scope, applicable technical regulation, HS code, and conformity assessment route with GEOSTM or an accredited conformity assessment body before shipment. Georgia is NOT a member of the EAEU — the EAC/TR CU conformity mark route does not apply and must not be claimed.
summary.zh: GEOSTM（格鲁吉亚国家标准与计量局）是格鲁吉亚国家标准化机构。格鲁吉亚《欧盟深度及全面自由贸易区协定》（DCFTA）义务要求格鲁吉亚向欧盟规范靠拢其技术法规和合格评定程序，使格鲁吉亚标准面向IEC/EN框架。GEOSTM将IEC和EN标准作为格鲁吉亚标准采用（出于历史原因采用GOST兼容命名，但方向与欧盟对接，非欧亚经济联盟）。进口至格鲁吉亚的电气产品（包括电动汽车充电桩）在技术法规生效的情况下，可能须接受GEOSTM合格评定。截至2026年6月14日，未能从官方来源确认GEOSTM发布的适用于所有EVSE整机的强制产品认证法规；出口商应在出货前向GEOSTM或认可合格评定机构核实当前GEOSTM适用范围、适用技术法规、HS编码和合格评定路径。格鲁吉亚不是欧亚经济联盟成员——EAC/TR CU合格标志路径不适用，不得作出此类声明。
summary.zht: GEOSTM（喬治亞國家標準與計量局）是喬治亞國家標準化機構。喬治亞《歐盟深度及全面自由貿易區協定》（DCFTA）義務要求喬治亞向歐盟規範靠攏其技術法規和合格評定程序，使喬治亞標準面向IEC/EN框架。GEOSTM將IEC和EN標準作為喬治亞標準採用（出於歷史原因採用GOST兼容命名，但方向與歐盟對接，非歐亞經濟聯盟）。進口至喬治亞的電氣產品（包括電動汽車充電樁）在技術法規生效的情況下，可能須接受GEOSTM合格評定。截至2026年6月14日，未能從官方來源確認GEOSTM發布的適用於所有EVSE整機的強制產品認證法規；出口商應在出貨前向GEOSTM或認可合格評定機構核實當前GEOSTM適用範圍、適用技術法規、HS編碼和合格評定路徑。喬治亞不是歐亞經濟聯盟成員——EAC/TR CU合格標誌路徑不適用，不得作出此類聲明。

standards_or_laws: GEOSTM — Georgian National Agency for Standards and Metrology (geostm.gov.ge)
Georgia–EU DCFTA — Deep and Comprehensive Free Trade Area Agreement (EU technical standards alignment obligation)
Georgia Law on Technical Regulation (technical barrier to trade framework)
IEC 61851-1:2017 and IEC 61851-23:2023 as adopted by GEOSTM
GNERC licensing and DNO connection approval requirements

summary.en: China-market chargers are documented against GB/T 18487.1-2023 for conductive charging system requirements and GB/T 20234 connector standards, with China Compulsory Certification (CCC) applying where the charger falls within CCC scope. China CCC or GB/T test evidence does not establish GEOSTM conformity or constitute a substitute for Georgia's IEC/EN-aligned conformity assessment obligations. The EAC/TR CU mark — used for EAEU member states (Russia, Belarus, Kazakhstan, Kyrgyzstan, Armenia) — is not applicable to Georgia and must not be used or claimed for Georgia market access.
summary.zh: 中国市场充电桩通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023传导充电系统要求及GB/T 20234连接器标准准备文件；如充电桩属于CCC适用范围，则须取得中国强制认证（CCC）。中国CCC或GB/T测试证据不能证明GEOSTM合规性，也不能替代格鲁吉亚IEC/EN对接合格评定义务。EAC/TR CU标志——适用于欧亚经济联盟成员国（俄罗斯、白俄罗斯、哈萨克斯坦、吉尔吉斯斯坦、亚美尼亚）——不适用于格鲁吉亚，不得用于或声称可用于格鲁吉亚市场准入。
summary.zht: 中國市場充電樁通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023傳導充電系統要求及GB/T 20234連接器標準準備文件；如充電樁屬於CCC適用範圍，則須取得中國強制認證（CCC）。中國CCC或GB/T測試證據不能證明GEOSTM合規性，也不能替代喬治亞IEC/EN對接合格評定義務。EAC/TR CU標誌——適用於歐亞經濟聯盟成員國（俄羅斯、白俄羅斯、哈薩克斯坦、吉爾吉斯斯坦、亞美尼亞）——不適用於喬治亞，不得用於或聲稱可用於喬治亞市場準入。

standards_or_laws: China CCC (3C) mandatory certification where in scope

gap.en: Exporters should: (1) verify the GEOSTM conformity assessment scope and applicable technical regulation for the specific EV charger product and HS code before shipment; (2) prepare IEC 61851-1 / IEC 61851-23 accredited safety test reports; (3) prepare IEC 61000 series accredited EMC test reports; (4) obtain IEC 62196 connector compliance evidence; (5) prepare labelling in Georgian (Georgian script / Mkhedruli) and English; (6) confirm GNERC licensing and DNO connection approval requirements with the relevant distribution-network operator. Do not assert that China CCC, GB/T test reports, or EAC/TR CU certificates establish Georgia market access.
gap.zh: 出口商应：(1) 在出货前核实具体电动汽车充电桩产品和HS编码的GEOSTM合格评定适用范围及适用技术法规；(2) 准备IEC 61851-1 / IEC 61851-23认可安全测试报告；(3) 准备IEC 61000系列认可EMC测试报告；(4) 获取IEC 62196接口合规证据；(5) 准备格鲁吉亚语（格鲁吉亚文字/Mkhedruli）和英语标签；(6) 与相关配电网运营商确认GNERC许可和配电网运营商接入审批要求。不得声称中国CCC、GB/T测试报告或EAC/TR CU证书可证明格鲁吉亚市场准入。
gap.zht: 出口商應：(1) 在出貨前核實具體電動汽車充電樁產品和HS編碼的GEOSTM合格評定適用範圍及適用技術法規；(2) 準備IEC 61851-1 / IEC 61851-23認可安全測試報告；(3) 準備IEC 61000系列認可EMC測試報告；(4) 獲取IEC 62196接口合規證據；(5) 準備喬治亞語（喬治亞文字/Mkhedruli）和英語標籤；(6) 與相關配電網運營商確認GNERC許可和配電網運營商接入審批要求。不得聲稱中國CCC、GB/T測試報告或EAC/TR CU證書可證明喬治亞市場準入。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — GEOSTM conformity assessment applies to electrical products where technical regulations are in force; exact EV charger mandatory scope and conformity route should be verified with GEOSTM for the specific product HS code; GNERC licensing and DNO connection approval are mandatory for grid-connected installations; EAC/TR CU route does not apply
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or recommended depending on China CCC scope; GB/T evidence and EAC/TR CU certificates are not GEOSTM conformity substitutes

source.publisher: GEOSTM — Georgian National Agency for Standards and Metrology

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not claim automatic Georgia market access from China CCC, GB/T reports, or EAC/TR CU certificates. Georgia is NOT in the EAEU. Verify the GEOSTM conformity assessment scope for the specific product and HS code, and address IEC safety/EMC evidence, IEC 62196 connector compliance, Georgian/English labelling, and GNERC/DNO grid-connection approval separately.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应凭中国CCC、GB/T报告或EAC/TR CU证书声称自动满足格鲁吉亚市场准入。格鲁吉亚不在欧亚经济联盟内。应核实具体产品和HS编码的GEOSTM合格评定适用范围，并分别处理IEC安全/EMC证据、IEC 62196接口合规、格鲁吉亚语/英语标签和GNERC/配电网运营商并网接入审批。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應憑中國CCC、GB/T報告或EAC/TR CU證書聲稱自動滿足喬治亞市場准入。喬治亞不在歐亞經濟聯盟內。應核實具體產品和HS編碼的GEOSTM合格評定適用範圍，並分別處理IEC安全/EMC證據、IEC 62196接口合規、喬治亞語/英語標籤和GNERC/配電網運營商併網接入審批。

requirement_topic.en: Georgia EV Market Context — Growing Adoption, Used-EV Imports, and EU DCFTA Direction
requirement_topic.zh: 格鲁吉亚电动汽车市场背景——普及加速、二手电动车进口及欧盟DCFTA方向
requirement_topic.zht: 喬治亞電動汽車市場背景——普及加速、二手電動車進口及歐盟DCFTA方向

summary.en: Georgia (Caucasus country, not the US state of Georgia) has seen notably high EV adoption driven in large part by significant used-EV imports, particularly from Japan, South Korea, and the United States. Tbilisi has an active and growing public charging network anchored by operators such as E-Space and Tesla destination chargers. Georgia's EU DCFTA alignment and Association Agreement create a policy environment oriented toward European technical standards, including IEC/EN for EV charging equipment, rather than EAEU/EAC frameworks. The Georgian government and energy sector regulator GNERC support the expansion of EV charging infrastructure. No single official national EV strategy document equivalent to an EU member state's NEAP (National Energy and Climate Plan) has been confirmed from official sources as of 2026-06-14, but the DCFTA trajectory and growing market demand make IEC-standard charging equipment the practical market requirement.
summary.zh: 格鲁吉亚（高加索地区国家，非美国佐治亚州）的电动汽车普及率显著提升，很大程度上受大量二手电动车进口（主要来自日本、韩国和美国）推动。第比利斯拥有活跃且持续扩张的公共充电网络，以E-Space和特斯拉目的地充电等运营商为核心。格鲁吉亚《欧盟深度及全面自由贸易区协定》对接和《联系国协议》营造了面向欧洲技术标准（包括电动汽车充电设备的IEC/EN）而非欧亚经济联盟/EAC框架的政策环境。格鲁吉亚政府和能源行业监管机构GNERC支持电动汽车充电基础设施扩张。截至2026年6月14日，未能从官方来源确认相当于欧盟成员国国家能源与气候计划（NEAP）的单一官方国家电动汽车战略文件；但DCFTA发展轨迹和不断增长的市场需求使IEC标准充电设备成为实际的市场要求。
summary.zht: 喬治亞（高加索地區國家，非美國喬治亞州）的電動汽車普及率顯著提升，很大程度上受大量二手電動車進口（主要來自日本、韓國和美國）推動。第比利斯擁有活躍且持續擴張的公共充電網絡，以E-Space和特斯拉目的地充電等運營商為核心。喬治亞《歐盟深度及全面自由貿易區協定》對接和《聯繫國協議》營造了面向歐洲技術標準（包括電動汽車充電設備的IEC/EN）而非歐亞經濟聯盟/EAC框架的政策環境。喬治亞政府和能源行業監管機構GNERC支持電動汽車充電基礎設施擴張。截至2026年6月14日，未能從官方來源確認相當於歐盟成員國國家能源與氣候計劃（NEAP）的單一官方國家電動汽車戰略文件；但DCFTA發展軌跡和不斷增長的市場需求使IEC標準充電設備成為實際的市場要求。

standards_or_laws: Georgia–EU Association Agreement and DCFTA — technical standards alignment obligation (ec.europa.eu/trade)
GNERC — Georgian National Energy and Water Supply Regulatory Commission (gnerc.org)
E-Space — major Georgian public EV charging network operator (e-space.ge)
GEOSTM — Georgian National Agency for Standards and Metrology (geostm.gov.ge)

summary.en: China's national EV infrastructure expansion is governed by the New Energy Vehicle Industry Development Plan (2021–2035) and related standards. China's domestic push does not translate into automatic Georgia market access. Georgia's EU-alignment means IEC/EN standards — not GB/T — are the relevant framework. Chinese manufacturers must separately satisfy Georgia's IEC 62196 connector, IEC 61851 safety, IEC 61000 EMC, GNERC grid-connection, and GEOSTM conformity requirements regardless of their home-market volumes or government-backed scale.
summary.zh: 中国国家电动汽车基础设施扩张由《新能源汽车产业发展规划（2021—2035年）》及相关标准管理。中国国内推广不能自动转换为格鲁吉亚市场准入。格鲁吉亚与欧盟对接意味着相关框架为IEC/EN标准，而非GB/T。中国制造商无论国内销量或政府支持规模如何，均须单独满足格鲁吉亚的IEC 62196接口、IEC 61851安全、IEC 61000 EMC、GNERC并网接入和GEOSTM合格评定要求。
summary.zht: 中國國家電動汽車基礎設施擴張由《新能源汽車產業發展規劃（2021—2035年）》及相關標準管理。中國國內推廣不能自動轉換為喬治亞市場准入。喬治亞與歐盟對接意味著相關框架為IEC/EN標準，而非GB/T。中國製造商無論國內銷量或政府支持規模如何，均須單獨滿足喬治亞的IEC 62196接口、IEC 61851安全、IEC 61000 EMC、GNERC併網接入和GEOSTM合格評定要求。

standards_or_laws: New Energy Vehicle Industry Development Plan 2021–2035 (China)
China National Development and Reform Commission charging-station requirements

gap.en: Georgia's growing EV market and IEC-aligned infrastructure create real procurement opportunity for manufacturers willing to adapt to IEC 62196 connectors and IEC 61851 / IEC 61000 standards. Chinese exporters should: monitor Georgian CPO tender announcements (E-Space, GNERC-licensed operators); confirm project specifications before quoting; allocate lead time for IEC connector redesign, accredited IEC safety and EMC testing, GEOSTM conformity assessment, and DNO grid-connection approvals. The fact that Georgia uses 220/380 V 50 Hz (same as China) eliminates one voltage-range risk, but all other IEC/EN conformity gates remain.
gap.zh: 格鲁吉亚电动汽车市场持续扩张及IEC体系基础设施为愿意适配IEC 62196接口和IEC 61851 / IEC 61000标准的制造商创造了真实采购机会。中国出口商应：关注格鲁吉亚充电点运营商招标公告（E-Space、GNERC许可运营商）；在报价前确认项目规范；为IEC接口重新设计、IEC安全及EMC认可测试、GEOSTM合格评定和配电网运营商并网接入审批预留交货期。格鲁吉亚采用220/380 V 50 Hz（与中国相同）消除了一项电压范围风险，但所有其他IEC/EN合规关卡仍然存在。
gap.zht: 喬治亞電動汽車市場持續擴張及IEC體系基礎設施為願意適配IEC 62196接口和IEC 61851 / IEC 61000標準的製造商創造了真實採購機會。中國出口商應：關注喬治亞充電點運營商招標公告（E-Space、GNERC許可運營商）；在報價前確認項目規範；為IEC接口重新設計、IEC安全及EMC認可測試、GEOSTM合格評定和配電網運營商併網接入審批預留交貨期。喬治亞採用220/380 V 50 Hz（與中國相同）消除了一項電壓範圍風險，但所有其他IEC/EN合規關卡仍然存在。

mandatory_status.target: Policy and market context — not itself a mandatory product standard; technical and conformity requirements under GEOSTM, GNERC, and IEC/EN remain in force independently
mandatory_status.cn: Policy context only — China EV policy does not affect Georgia conformity obligations; EAEU/EAC frameworks are not applicable

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Georgia's IEC-aligned and growing EV charging market creates real demand for Type 2 / CCS2 chargers. Chinese exporters should treat this as a market signal, not a conformity shortcut. The 220/380 V 50 Hz voltage match removes one barrier; connector redesign to IEC 62196, IEC 61851 / IEC 61000 accredited test evidence, GEOSTM conformity assessment, and GNERC / DNO grid approvals are each mandatory gates. EAC/TR CU certification does not apply in Georgia.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 格鲁吉亚与IEC对接且持续扩张的电动汽车充电市场为Type 2 / CCS2充电桩创造了真实需求。中国出口商应将此视为市场信号，而非合规捷径。220/380 V 50 Hz电压匹配消除了一个障碍；接口重新设计为IEC 62196、IEC 61851 / IEC 61000认可测试证据、GEOSTM合格评定和GNERC / 配电网运营商并网审批均是不可或缺的合规关卡。EAC/TR CU认证在格鲁吉亚不适用。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 喬治亞與IEC對接且持續擴張的電動汽車充電市場為Type 2 / CCS2充電樁創造了真實需求。中國出口商應將此視為市場信號，而非合規捷徑。220/380 V 50 Hz電壓匹配消除了一個障礙；接口重新設計為IEC 62196、IEC 61851 / IEC 61000認可測試證據、GEOSTM合格評定和GNERC / 配電網運營商併網審批均是不可或缺的合規關卡。EAC/TR CU認證在喬治亞不適用。
